choose.when: SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS sgg_cd, '서울 전체' AS sgg_nm, deal_year, deal_month, SUM(trade_count) AS trade_count, ROUND(SUM(avg_price * trade_count) / SUM(trade_count)) AS avg_price, ROUND(SUM(avg_price_per_pyeong * trade_count) / SUM(trade_count), 2) AS avg_price_per_pyeong, NULL AS price_change_rate FROM monthly_price_summary WHERE trade_count > 0 GROUP BY deal_year, deal_month ORDER BY deal_year ASC, deal_month ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT id, sgg_cd, sgg_nm, deal_year, deal_month, trade_count, avg_price, avg_price_per_pyeong, price_change_rate FROM monthly_price_summary WHERE sgg_cd = #{sggCd} ORDER BY deal_year ASC, deal_month ASC

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sgg_cd, sgg_nm FROM monthly_price_summary ORDER BY sgg_cd ASC
